source: Malaysia national (federal) public holidays 2026, per gazetted list (officeholidays.com/countries/malaysia/2026). BNM's Financial Intelligence and Enforcement Department sits in WP Kuala Lumpur; Deepavali is observed there. Islamic dates (Hari Raya Aidilfitri, Hari Raya Haji, Awal Muharram, Maulidur Rasul) are set by JAKIM moon-sighting and may shift by a day. Scope: calendar year 2026 (the demo year) — extend per year.

holidays.name: Birthday of SPB Yang di-Pertuan Agong
